name: presentation-factory
description: The Slalom Presentation Factory — orchestrates the Frame → Draft → Compose → Ship pipeline for producing branded 16:9 presentations in two styles (informational, presentational), three brands (Slalom default, Composable DXP secondary, Client custom), and three outputs (HTML → PDF → editable PPTX with movable assets). Cowork-native: walks intake via AskUserQuestion, ingests client brand from URL or PDF, drafts content with consulting + design + humanize skills, composes HTML slides from 25 canonical templates, exports to PDF, converts to editable PowerPoint.
author: Bermon Painter
